ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the city is located */,
  "lat" REAL /* Latitude of the city */,
  "lon" REAL /* Longitude of the city */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the city */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cities_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* Abbreviated code for the state (e.g., VA, AL) */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the state */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fuel_types" (
  "fuel_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fuel type */,
  "fuel_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the fuel type (e.g., gasoline, diesel) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fuel type */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the fuel */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fuel_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fuel_qualities" (
  "fuel_quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fuel quality */,
  "fuel_quality_name" TEXT /* Name of the fuel quality (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fuel quality */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fuel_quality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fuel_prices" (
  "fuel_price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fuel price entry */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city where the fuel price is tracked */,
  "fuel_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fuel type */,
  "fuel_quality_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fuel quality */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the fuel */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of fuel */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the fuel price was recorded */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source */,
  "source_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fuel_price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fuel_prices_fuel_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("fuel_type_id") REFERENCES fuel_types ("fuel_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fuel_prices_fuel_quality_id FOREIGN KEY ("fuel_quality_id") REFERENCES fuel_qualities ("fuel_quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fuel_prices_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price trend entry */,
  "fuel_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fuel type */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the price trend was recorded */,
  "average_price" REAL /* Average price of the fuel */,
  "min_price" REAL /* Minimum price of the fuel */,
  "max_price" REAL /* Maximum price of the fuel */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_trends_fuel_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("fuel_type_id") REFERENCES fuel_types ("fuel_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_trends_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fuel_quality_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fuel quality trend entry */,
  "fuel_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fuel type */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the fuel quality trend was recorded */,
  "average_quality" REAL /* Average quality of the fuel */,
  "min_quality" REAL /* Minimum quality of the fuel */,
  "max_quality" REAL /* Maximum quality of the fuel */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fuel_quality_trends_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fuel_quality_trends_fuel_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("fuel_type_id") REFERENCES fuel_types ("fuel_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, moderator, user) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fuel_price_alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "fuel_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fuel type */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city */,
  "price_threshold" REAL /* Price threshold for the alert */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the alert (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fuel_price_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fuel_price_alerts_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fuel_price_alerts_fuel_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("fuel_type_id") REFERENCES fuel_types ("fuel_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fuel_quality_alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "fuel_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fuel type */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city */,
  "quality_threshold" REAL /* Quality threshold for the alert */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the alert (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fuel_quality_alerts_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fuel_quality_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fuel_quality_alerts_fuel_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("fuel_type_id") REFERENCES fuel_types ("fuel_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "city_fuel_prices" (
  "city_fuel_price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city fuel price entry */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city */,
  "fuel_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fuel type */,
  "fuel_quality_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fuel quality */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the fuel */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of fuel */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the fuel price was recorded */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source */,
  "source_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_fuel_price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_city_fuel_prices_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_city_fuel_prices_fuel_quality_id FOREIGN KEY ("fuel_quality_id") REFERENCES fuel_qualities ("fuel_quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_city_fuel_prices_fuel_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("fuel_type_id") REFERENCES fuel_types ("fuel_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "city_fuel_qualities" (
  "city_fuel_quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city fuel quality entry */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city */,
  "fuel_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fuel type */,
  "quality" REAL /* Quality of the fuel */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the fuel quality was recorded */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source */,
  "source_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_fuel_quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_city_fuel_qualities_fuel_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("fuel_type_id") REFERENCES fuel_types ("fuel_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_city_fuel_qualities_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ppg" (
  "ppg_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each PPG entry */,
  "fuel_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fuel type */,
  "ppg" REAL /* Price Per Gallon (PPG) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ppg_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ppg_fuel_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("fuel_type_id") REFERENCES fuel_types ("fuel_type_id")
)
